ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-10-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petn. For Waiver Of Appt. Of Probate Referee
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Henry Glasser appearing for executor. Counsel stated that the executor is the sole heir. There is not objection to the petition. Court stated it is the Court's Policy and in our Local Rule 14.56, waivers of appointment of probate referee are not favored. Court can not find good cause to grant this petition. Matter is denied. Judge Pro Tem: Stella Pantazis. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petn. For Waiver Of Appt. Of Probate Referee
Off Calendar Dec-05-2006 Continued To Dec-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. Matter is continued to 12/19. Clerk to call counsel. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Ron Sinclair. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-27-2006 Continued To Jul-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Henry Glasser appearing for petitioner. Court can not view the declaration filed on 6/23. Counsel provides a copy for the court. Counsel does not have personal knowledge that all the nieces and nephews are adults. Court wants the petitioner to sign the supplement. The proof of holographic instrument was signed by the sole beneficiary . Court wants another proof by someone else. Court will require bond in the amount of $10,000.00. Matter is continued to 7/11. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
